Intensify Death  

Description

3: Increase STR by 20 (L23) to 53 (L53)
4: Increase Attack Speed by 10% (L23) to 40% (L41)
6: Increase AC by 4 (L23) to 12 (L49)

Details   Raw Spell Data, Lucy Spell View

Mana: 50 Skill: Alteration
Casting Time: 6.5 Recast Time: 1.5
Fizzle Time: 1.5 Range: 100
Location: Any Time of Day: Any
Fizzle Adj: 25 Deletable: Yes
Blockable: Yes Focusable: Yes
Dispellable: Yes Interruptable: Yes
Short Buff Box: No Target Type: Pet
Spell Type: Beneficial Source: Live 12/03

Messages

Cast on other: Soandso 's eyes gleam with madness.

Game Description

Intensifies the power of your undead servant, increasing their strength, armor class, and attack speed.

Items with this effect

  • Skull Mask of Innervation
  • Spell: Intensify Death
  • Spell: Intensify Death [crafted]

Quick Facts

Scroll:
Spell: Intensify Death
Spell: Intensify Death
ClassLevel
NEC23
Expansion:

Duration:
1 hour

This spell is now on Heretic Drahur in PoK
▲ Page top
Rotts quest was a pain
QuoteReply
# Aug 18 2006 at 9:06 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591792091014
5 posts
You have to have a good faction with the Brood of Kotiz in order to turn the notes in from Rott's quest. I spent 3-4 hours getting the pages(they droped often but you get double of ones you already have sometimes). And I spent about 3-4 hours(I think) doing the First Rank skull cap, Second Rank Skullcap quest and The Penance quest to raise my faction(not sure if just The Penance would have done it). Did that quest with a level 3 necro.

Edited, Aug 20th 2006 at 6:47pm EDT by Ynaity

guess i gotta skill up past twenty the hard way.

What is the research trivial for this spell? I have research skill at 65 and have tried twice and failed both times. I'm scared to try again, since the words seem hard to get.
▲ Page top
RE: Research Trivial
QuoteReply
# Feb 03 2005 at 11:34 PM Rating: Decent
Ebelch
View User Forum
626 posts
This spell is trivial at 62. I believe you can still fail a trivial attempt.

Sorry about your bad luck.

▲ Page top
Guess on time for drops
QuoteReply
# Nov 30 2004 at 2:11 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1642983438479
Scholar
263 posts
I saw this in the Baz for 500p - should have bought it.

Instead, I went to LOIO to do the quest. With my pretty decently twinked 26 necro and fully buffed pet (temp and shammy buffs on both, 500hp belt, haste mask and hand weapon), I thought I could do the quest no prob. Well, the gobbies have a fair number of HP, don't come single, and run. After steady killing until the buffs wore off, I had ZERO pages.

Change in tactics. Log in monk. After 3+ hours of constant clearing, I finally got the pages. I shoulda bought it when I saw it. If I were to sell it, I think 2-3K would be my price for the trouble.
▲ Page top
How to: get this spell if you are NOT an Iksar
QuoteReply
# Oct 09 2004 at 10:46 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1593362923560
12 posts
If you are NOT an Iksar here is the logical way to achieve this spell with little hassle.
1. Make a Iksar necromancer, make the name spellguy, or gettinspells, or something to that effect.
2. log on to your normal necromancer and go to lake of ill omen (loil). Collect the illegible notes 1-4 off of mobs a Goblin soothslayer, and a Goblin spiritcaller, by killing them. Hint: before you kill them you can cast the spell: Identify on a mob to see what part of the note they are holding before you attack them to make this go faster.
3. Once you have Illegible notes 1-4...go to the bank. put the notes in a bag in your SHARED BANK. Log off.
4. Log on your Iksar Necromancer spell guy, and turn the notes into Keeper Rott. You will recieve spell: Intensify Death. Go to the bank, put spell: Intensify Death into the shared bank.
5. Log on regular necromancer. Go to bank and pull spell: Intensify Death out of the shared bank. WALLLAHHH
6. ENJOY!
▲ Page top
RE: How to: get this spell if you are NOT an Iksar
QuoteReply
# Jan 12 2005 at 5:56 AM Rating: Default
Ebelch
View User Forum
626 posts
1) If you are NOT an Iksar here is the logical way to achieve this spell with little hassle.

2) Make a Iksar necromancer,

3) make the name spellguy,

4) or gettinspells, or something to that effect.

5) log on to your normal necromancer

6) and go to lake of ill omen (loil).

7) Collect the illegible notes 1-4 off of mobs

8) a Goblin soothslayer, and a Goblin spiritcaller

9) , by killing them.

10) Hint: before you kill them you can cast the spell: Identify
on a mob to see what part of the note they are holding before you attack them to make this go faster.

11) Once you have Illegible notes 1-4...go to the bank.

12) put the notes in a bag in your SHARED BANK.

13) Log off.

14) Log on your Iksar Necromancer spell guy,

15) and turn the notes into Keeper Rott.

16) You will recieve spell: Intensify Death.

17) Go to the bank,

18) put spell: Intensify Death into the shared bank.

19) Log on regular necromancer

20) Go to bank

21) and pull spell: Intensify Death out of the shared bank.

22) WALLLAHHH

23) ENJOY!

Edited, Wed Jan 12 05:56:29 2005

▲ Page top
found in Warsliks Woods
QuoteReply
# May 09 2003 at 2:43 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591775422520
View User Forum
28 posts
I got 2 of the Words of Recluse that are needed to make this spell in Warsliks Woods on the skulking brutes in the caves near the entrance to Dalnir. Lot of gems dropped also. The brutes aren't social and can be singled pulled so it is a good solo camp, just watch for the roamer.

shalix - 61shaman
khalix - 57warrior
mazo - 25magician
prexus server

Edited, Fri May 9 15:06:56 2003
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Mar 10 2003 at 12:26 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Pet buff spell.
WHERE CAN IT BE FOUND
QuoteReply
# Feb 15 2003 at 8:42 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593362339123
19 posts
I HAVE NO IDEA WHERE THIS SPELL IS MY NERCO NEEDS IT. THIS SPELL IS SWEET IT LIKE BEING A SHAMMY ALL OVER AGAIN.
▲ Page top
RE: WHERE CAN IT BE FOUND
QuoteReply
# Feb 28 2003 at 3:04 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591785467635
8 posts
It's a research spell. You need to find the following:

Words of the Sentient (beza)
Words of Recluse
Words of Absorption

Combine these in your Book of Dark Bindings, and if you have sufficient Research skill, you'll get your spell.

Aaeldiven
Necromancer
31 Season
